Unified script launcher

positional arguments:
  {verify,gate,package,contract,verify-prepare,verify-smoke,verify-fill-score,verify-insight,verify-bind-doc,verify-fill-template,verify-status,verify-finalize,gate-doc-sync,gate-cfg-hygiene,gate-capl-sync,gate-cli-readiness,package-build-exe}

    gate                Quality gate commands

    verify-smoke        Legacy alias: verify smoke
    verify-fill-score   Legacy alias: verify fill-score
    verify-insight      Legacy alias: verify insight
    verify-bind-doc     Legacy alias: verify bind-doc
    verify-fill-template
                        Legacy alias: verify fill-template
    verify-status       Legacy alias: verify status
    verify-finalize     Legacy alias: verify finalize
    gate-doc-sync       Legacy alias: gate doc-sync
    gate-cfg-hygiene    Legacy alias: gate cfg-hygiene
    gate-capl-sync      Legacy alias: gate capl-sync
    gate-cli-readiness  Legacy alias: gate cli-readiness
    package-build-exe   Legacy alias: package build-exe

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit

verify group help: PASS (rc=0)
usage: run.py verify [-h]
                     {prepare,smoke,fill-score,insight,bind-doc,fill-template,status,finalize}
                     ...

positional arguments:
  {prepare,smoke,fill-score,insight,bind-doc,fill-template,status,finalize}
    prepare             Create UT/IT/ST evidence run folders
    smoke               Run CANoe COM smoke checks
    fill-score          Fill and score one tier
    insight             Build run-level insight report
    bind-doc            Build 05/06/07 doc binding bundle
    fill-template       Build 05/06/07 doc fill template
    status              Check run readiness before finalize
    finalize            Run full post-run verification bundle

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit

gate group help: PASS (rc=0)
usage: run.py gate [-h] {doc-sync,cfg-hygiene,capl-sync,cli-readiness} ...

positional arguments:
  {doc-sync,cfg-hygiene,capl-sync,cli-readiness}
    doc-sync            Run Req-Doc-Code sync gate
    cfg-hygiene         Run cfg text hygiene gate
    capl-sync           Run src/capl vs cfg/channel_assign sync gate
    cli-readiness       Run CLI readiness gate before GUI phase

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
